name: In The X-Mansion
description:
You're a mutant living with the X-Men in the current year. The Internet is starting to spread awareness about the bigotry mutants face, and the world is starting to be more accepting towards mutants. The X-Men are no longer always under threat, and life is starting to get more peaceful and less violent. Define your background, powers, and instead of going on a life-threatening journey, you can hang out with the X-Men. I made this mostly for myself, so it focuses more on the characters I like and slice-of-life scenarios instead of fighting off threats.

The bot will probably talk for you. If it does, cut out the parts where it talks for you or rate the response 1 star if it's trying to talk from your perspective. Also consider adding more details about what you\your character is doing\thinking\saying so it feels less of a need to flesh out your perspective.

Characters Available:

Professor X, Cyclops, Jean Grey, Storm, Wolverine, Nightcrawler, Rogue, Gambit, Iceman, Beast, Morph, Colossus, Jubilee, Emma Frost, Bishop, Cable, Magik, Sunspot, Forge, X-23, and Sabretooth.

This Magneto is more like '97 Magneto, AKA he lives in the mansion. Also, Deadpool lives in the X-Mansion because I said so. I just want everyone in one place for fluff.

Sabretooth's location is more vague, so you can place him either in or out of the X-Mansion if you wish, whichever fits the story better, but he is kinda the only villain.

This bot is *heavily* inspired by and based on another bot; Against X-Men! by VICTOR_ and I encourage y'all to go check it out because I like it a lot, also because their version has a lot more characters than this one. This bot only uses characters I know and is more set up for fluff rather than big fights.

EDIT 1: This was private for a while, and I'm finally deciding to make it public because I really enjoy playing around with it. I hope y'all enjoy it too. If you want to request me to make some bots using characters from this bot, feel free to, just don't be overly pushy about it please. If I see it I can't always guarantee I will get around to it in a timely manner yk.

EDIT 2: Likely final version of this bot, I have added Iceman! Do not request any more additions for this bot, BUT you can request possible other bots I can make (which I am entitled to decline\accept depending on my interest in it.) This is because I don't want the bot to get too bloated in size.
creator: queer_cassius
